facebook.content:
Family Prayer Focus

As we continue to build strong families that honor God, I want to emphasize the importance of setting boundaries.

Lord, we decree that families will know how to set healthy boundaries, honoring Your original design for marriage and family. Grant us wisdom to communicate lovingly and effectively, protecting our loved ones from the world's influences and preserving our relationships for Your glory. We will not let the world dictate our family dynamics.

facebook.pullQuote: We will not let the world dictate our family dynamics.

instagram.content:
Family Prayer Focus

This month, I want us to focus on praying for our families to be blessed with wisdom and unity.

Lord, I declare Your wisdom and presence in every family who is struggling. Let Your peace and love guide them, and let them walk in unity and harmony. Let this be a season of healing and restoration, not just for the family, but for generations to come.
